title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
